steps.title: Extract two points from the table
steps.content: From the table, we have the points $(0, n)$ and $(3, n + 14)$.

steps.title: Calculate slope using the slope formula
steps.content: Slope is $$\frac{\Delta y}{\Delta x} = \frac{(n + 14) - n}{3 - 0} = \frac{14}{3}$$. The constant $n$ cancels, leaving a clean ratio. That matches choice C — C is correct.
